Free returns
The story

We refused to make a shirt that falls apart.

Meridian started with the perfect white tee that went thin after one season. Two years later, we'd sourced long-staple organic cotton, dialed in a heavier 240gsm knit, and built collars that hold their roll.

240.grams per square metre — heavyweight, opaque, built to last

The Collection

Five shirts. A deliberately small range — each one earns its place in the drawer.

The Fabric

Long-staple

The Difference
You Don't See

Anyone can sell a plain shirt. These four details are why ours come back from the wash looking new.

[01]

Long-staple cotton

Smoother, stronger fibres that resist pilling and keep their hand-feel for years.

[02]

Pre-shrunk & colorfast

Garment-washed before you see them — what you try on is what you keep.

[03]

Reinforced collars & seams

Double-stitched stress points and taped shoulders that hold their shape.

[04]

Small runs, restocked

We make less, more carefully — and bring back what works, not trends.

How it works
Drawer to Doorstep

Find your fit

01

Take the 30-second fit quiz online, or book a fitting at the Valencia St flagship.

Choose your shirts

02

Order online or in-store. We keep the line tight on purpose, so the choice is easy.

Wear them in

03

Free 30-day returns and free repairs on seams and buttons, for the life of the shirt.

FAQ

Good to know
[01]What weight is the cotton?+
Our tees are a heavyweight 240gsm organic combed cotton; oxfords are a midweight 140gsm washed cotton. Both stay opaque and hold their shape.
[02]How do your shirts fit?+
Classic and boxy fits. Every product page lists full measurements, or book a flagship fitting and we'll size you in person.
[03]Do they shrink?+
Everything is pre-shrunk and garment-washed, so what you try on is what you keep. Wash cold, hang or tumble low.
[04]What's your return policy?+
Free 30-day returns on unworn shirts, plus free repairs on seams and buttons for the life of the shirt.
[05]Do you do custom or team orders?+
Yes — add a monogram online, or talk to us about small-run embroidery for teams, events, and gifts.
Where we serve

Nationwide Online · SF In Person

Free carbon-neutral shipping across the U.S. The Valencia St flagship is a quick walk for these neighborhoods.
